title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. Panamaxes Steal the Spotlight as Dry Bulk Rallies - Over the past two weeks, Panamax spot rates have demonstrated an impressive and largely unexpected performance, with the Index reaching its highest levels in over a year and currently hovering around the 16,000 mark.

Dry Bulk Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
July 22, 2025
• Panamaxes Steal the Spotlight as Dry Bulk Rallies - Over the past two weeks,
Short-term Indicators
Panamax spot rates have demonstrated an impressive and largely unexpected
Momentum: Positive
performance, with the Index reaching its highest levels in over a year and currently
hovering around the 16,000 mark. This represents a notably strong performance Sentiment: Neutral
for an asset class that has experienced subdued activity over the past year.
